## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubble, clear, close, delete, remove, cancel, silence, mute, moderate

## Categories
social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/message-square-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageSquareOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageSquareOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
